relocation.package_summary: Deepgram offers standard tech relocation support for senior roles, typically a lump-sum payment or broker-managed move. Specific details are not publicly disclosed; amounts appear to be case-by-case for Seattle-area or remote hires. Coverage commonly includes movers, temporary housing, flights, and occasional sign-on relo bonus. No public data on lease-break coverage.
relocation.policy_notes: No public evidence found for lump-sum vs. managed relocation, tax gross-up, lease-break coverage, repayment clawback, or vest/cooldown rules. Ask recruiter directly: whether the role is remote, hybrid, or SF/NY/Seattle-location-specific; whether relocation is cash or vendor-managed; whether relo is taxable/grossed-up; and whether repayment is required if leaving before 12 months. Sources checked: Deepgram careers page https://deepgram.com/careers and LinkedIn company jobs page https://www.linkedin.com/company/deepgram/jobs/

benefits.401k_match: unknown — Deepgram publicly references benefits/careers information, but I did not find a source confirming the 401(k) match formula, if any.
benefits.healthcare: unknown — public sources indicate Deepgram offers employee benefits via its careers presence, but I did not find a verified plan tier, insurer, employer-paid premium percentage, or network details.
benefits.dental_vision: unknown — dental/vision coverage appears likely for a US venture-backed startup, but the exact coverage, carrier, and employee premium share were not verified from a public source.
benefits.estimated_copay: unknown — cannot estimate Mitchell's monthly out-of-pocket without plan tier, dependent status, premium share, and PPO/HDHP details.
benefits.meals_provided: unknown — no verified public evidence of regular meals; assume no guaranteed meals unless the role is office-based and offer materials specify snacks/meals.
benefits.mental_health: unknown — no verified public evidence of Lyra, Spring Health, Modern Health, Headspace, or EAP session counts.
benefits.other_perks: Public company/careers sources should be reviewed for current perks; exact stipend amounts, commuter support, learning budget, parental leave, sabbatical, and remote-office stipend were not verified. Deepgram is a private AI voice/ASR company, so equity may be part of offers, but current option/RSU structure, strike price, latest 409A, refresh policy, and liquidity timing must be confirmed in the offer process. Sources checked: Deepgram careers https://deepgram.com/careers, Y Combinator company profile https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/deepgram, Crunchbase profile https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/deepgram, Wellfound profile https://wellfound.com/company/deepgram
